creator: martti.kuparinen@iki.fi
text:
While creating packages for KDE 2.2 I noticed that some KDE 2.2
modules have incorrect pkg-plist settings. At least the following
have incorrect pkg-plist files:

- kdebase2
- kdegraphics2
- kdemultimedia2

The following patch should fix kdebase2/pkg-plist. I didn't have
time (it took 3 hours to compile kdebase2 :-) to correct the other
modules and check other packages if they have missing entries in
their pkg-plist as well.

I think we need to verify each kde*2's pkg-plist for missing and/or
incorrect entries...
